message.content:
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
actor Grower
actor Manager
interface System
database db

participant "Buyer" as B
participant "Grower" as G
participant "Manager" as M
participant "System" as S
participant "db" as D

B -- G : Make Order Change Request
M -- S : Email Order Change Request
S -- D : Insert Order Change Request

rectangle "Confirmation process" {
    M -- B : Confirm details of Order Change Request over email
    M -- G : Confirm details of Order Change Request over email
    B -- G : [All agreed?]
    M -- S : Edit Order
    S -- D : Update Order
    S -- D : Update Order Change Request
    S -- G : Email details Order Change
    S -- B : Email details Order Change
    B -- G : [Not agreed to?]
}

note right of S
Nothing to do here unless we add a Change Request editing function
@endnote

@enduml
